creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to amendlik from comment #23)
Correct. You misunderstand.

FreeIPA has an MIT KRB5 KDC running on top of Linux O/S.

I an running and have tested on a MIT KRB5 KDC running on a FreeBSD O/S. There is no FreeBSD native Heimdal KDC involved whatsoever. The MIT KRB5 KDC I am running supports those ciphers. The FreeIPA KDC does not.

FreeBSD native Heimdal works with MIT KRB5 KDC. Using a Fedora 36 OpenSSH client with a TGT from my MIT KRB5 KDC to connect to a FreeBSD OpenSSH server linked against Heimdal also works. I use this to connect from $JOB and my FreeBSD network.

Can you please try the OpenSSH patch I posted and rely entirely on PAM? Otherwise I cannot tell if the calls to native Heimdal libraries by OpenSSH are involved with this problem. Until such time this test is performed I must rely entirely on my testing to conclude that FreeBSD Heimdal libraries work with an MIT KRB5 KDC, which I have been using here for two and a half decades now.
